FUNDAMENTAL OF RAO'S SYSTEM OF NADl AS1ROLOGY 99
Chandra (Mind) is essential and Ravi (Sun) the significator of
Soul has to give the results. So, 10 house is the house of
profession and II house is the house ofgain. The gains of the
native's good or bad deeds are to be spent as expenditure.
House of loss (expenditure) means is the sign of Meena
(Pisces) ofkalapurusha (Time personified).This sign has been
compared to the abode of gods. Native, after spending the
accumulated results of good or bad deeds, he takes birth again.
With this, the birth of Kalapurusha (Time Personifed) means the
Sign of Aries (Mesha). From here all activities are starting. After
birth, he should get a gain with a female; the 2nd house to
Mesha (Aries) becomes the house ofKutumba/family.
In this world, only Saturn (Sani) is considered for
